text.div:
Individual Healthcare Identifier Record Status

https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/ihi-record-status-1

The Individual Healthcare Identifier Record Status value set includes values that may be used to describe the classification status of a record of an Individual Healthcare Identifier.

name: IndividualHealthcareIdentifierRecordStatus
title: Individual Healthcare Identifier Record Status
description: The Individual Healthcare Identifier Record Status value set includes values that may be used to describe the classification status of a record of an Individual Healthcare Identifier.
